name: weegloo-service-user
description: Weegloo ServiceLogin SDK for browser apps - Google OAuth 2.0 sign-in for app-managed members of a Weegloo Space. Pure vanilla JavaScript, zero dependencies.
author: Weegloo

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;const t=require('fs').readFileSync('src/service-login.js','utf8');if(t.indexOf(\"'\"+v+\"'\")<0&&t.indexOf('\"'+v+'\"')<0){throw new Error('VERSION mismatch in src/service-login.js: package.json='+v);}console.log('OK src/service-login.js (VERSION='+v+')');"
